corrected_fields.summary: This source is the ECB's Bulgarian-language navigation/index page for monetary policy decisions, not an actual policy decision document. It contains links to monetary policy strategy, tools, asset purchase programs, and references a press conference dated March 19, 2026, but does not contain the actual decision content, rate statements, or policy guidance.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page serves as an entry point to ECB monetary policy information but contains no actionable policy content. Researchers seeking ECB rate decisions or policy statements should navigate to specific decision pages or press releases rather than this index.
